case_title: DENISE MARTINEZ et al VS. BRENNER D INACIO

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-29-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-11-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED; JUDGE PRO TEM AMANDA FISHER -

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, DENISE MARTINEZ, ANDREW J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INACIO, BRENNER D $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,695.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT INACIO, BRENNER D
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, DENISE MARTINEZ, ANDREW J AS TO DEFENDANT INACIO, BRENNER D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, DENISE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ; AFFIDAVIT ($120.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED OCT-14-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT INACIO, BRENNER D

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY MARTINEZ, DENISE MARTINEZ, ANDREW J INACIO, BRENNER D
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT INACIO, BRENNER D
